codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, current Go service implementation, and tests. The shared `internal/server` package provides the required health endpoint, environment-based port selection, and graceful shutdown behavior for the five service binaries, and the test suite exercises the requested handler, startup, shutdown, and port-configuration paths. I did not find any high-confidence correctness defects in the implementation.

summary: Pass. The Go service scaffold implements the requested shared server behavior for all five binaries and includes relevant tests without any actionable correctness issues found in review.
